span.class: position-absolute badge rounded-circle bg-danger text-white d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
span.style: top: 15px; right: 15px; width: 22px; height: 22px; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: bold; line-height: 1;

i.t-attf-class: fa fa-clock-o fa-5x #{'text-success' if employee.attendance_state != 'checked_in' else 'text-danger'} animate-pulse

div.p: Recording your work hours with GPS location

button.t-attf-class: btn btn-lg px-5 py-3 shadow-sm fw-bold #{'btn-danger' if employee.attendance_state == 'checked_in' else 'btn-success'}

div.class: card-header bg-white border-0 py-3 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center
alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show shadow-sm border-0 mb-4
alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show shadow-sm border-0 mb-4

button.class: btn btn-primary px-4 py-2 shadow-sm fw-bold

div.class: card shadow-sm border-0 h-100 text-center p-3

span.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill px-3 py-2 #{'bg-success' if leave.state == 'validate' else 'bg-warning' if leave.state == 'confirm' else 'bg-danger' if leave.state == 'refuse' else 'bg-secondary'}

textarea.name: name
textarea.placeholder: Explain why you need this time off...

span.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill px-3 py-2 #{'bg-success' if slip.state in ['done', 'paid'] else 'bg-warning'}

a.class: btn btn-outline-primary px-4 py-2 shadow-sm fw-bold

span.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill px-3 py-2 #{'bg-success' if task.state == '1_done' else 'bg-info' if task.is_task_started else 'bg-primary'}

div.class: card shadow-sm border-0 bg-white p-4 overflow-hidden position-relative

span.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill px-3 py-2 #{'bg-success' if task.state == '1_done' else 'bg-primary'}

t.p: No description provided for this task.

div.class: card shadow-sm border-0 bg-danger text-white p-4 text-center mb-4

div.p: Click start to begin tracking your time on this task.

a.class: btn btn-success btn-lg rounded-pill px-5 fw-bold mt-2 shadow-sm border-0
btn btn-warning btn-lg rounded-pill px-5 fw-bold mt-2 shadow-sm border-0 text-dark

div.p: This task has been marked as finished.

a.class: btn btn-success btn-lg rounded-pill px-5 fw-bold mt-2 shadow-sm border-0
btn btn-link text-white text-decoration-none small opacity-75 p-0

li.class: list-group-item d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center py-3 text-danger

div.class: card-header bg-white border-0 py-3 d-flex align-items-center
alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show shadow-sm border-0 mb-4
alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show shadow-sm border-0 mb-4

button.class: btn btn-success px-4 py-2 shadow-sm fw-bold

div.class: alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show shadow-sm border-0 mb-4
alert alert-danger alert-dismissible fade show shadow-sm border-0 mb-4

button.class: btn btn-dark px-4 py-2 shadow-sm fw-bold

span.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill px-3 py-2 #{'bg-secondary' if exp.state == 'draft' else 'bg-info' if exp.state == 'reported' else 'bg-primary' if exp.state == 'approved' else 'bg-success' if exp.state == 'done' else 'bg-danger' if exp.state == 'refused' else 'bg-dark'}

input.name: name
input.placeholder: e.g. Travel fuel or Business dinner

div.class: d-flex flex-column flex-md-row justify-content-between align-items-md-center mb-4
btn-group mt-3 mt-md-0 shadow-sm rounded-pill p-1 bg-white border

a.t-attf-class: btn rounded-pill px-4 py-2 fw-bold text-sm #{'btn-dark text-white' if week_type == 'current' else 'btn-link text-muted text-decoration-none'}
btn rounded-pill px-4 py-2 fw-bold text-sm #{'btn-dark text-white' if week_type == 'next' else 'btn-link text-muted text-decoration-none'}

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm p-4 bg-white rounded-4 h-100
card border-0 shadow-sm p-4 bg-white rounded-4 h-100
card border-0 shadow-sm p-4 bg-white rounded-4 h-100
d-flex align-items-center p-3 rounded-3 border border-dashed

i.class: fa fa-coffee fa-lg me-3 text-muted opacity-50

div.class: p-3 mb-2 last-mb-0 rounded-4 border bg-white shadow-xs position-relative overflow-hidden shift-card
d-flex flex-column flex-md-row justify-content-between align-items-start align-items-md-center

span.class: badge rounded-pill px-3 py-1 bg-dark text-white fw-bold small me-2 my-1
badge bg-light text-dark border rounded-pill px-3 py-2 fw-bold

div.class: d-flex flex-column flex-md-row justify-content-between align-items-md-center mb-4

div.p: Track and manage your customer pipeline and closed deals.

button.class: btn btn-primary rounded-pill px-4 py-2 fw-bold d-flex align-items-center shadow-sm

div.class: alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show shadow-sm rounded-4 border-0 mb-4 p-3
div.div: Success! New opportunity has been submitted and added to your pipeline.

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm p-4 bg-white rounded-4 h-100
card border-0 shadow-sm p-4 bg-white rounded-4 h-100
card border-0 shadow-sm p-4 bg-white rounded-4 h-100
card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-4 p-3 mb-4 bg-white

a.t-attf-class: btn rounded-pill px-3 py-2 fw-bold text-sm text-center w-50 #{'btn-dark text-white' if filterby == 'pipeline' else 'btn-link text-muted text-decoration-none'}
btn rounded-pill px-3 py-2 fw-bold text-sm text-center w-50 #{'btn-dark text-white' if filterby == 'closed' else 'btn-link text-muted text-decoration-none'}

input.name: search
input.placeholder: Search by Lead name, Customer or Email...

button.class: btn btn-outline-secondary rounded-end-pill border-start-0 px-4 bg-white text-muted

a.class: btn btn-light rounded-pill px-3 py-2 w-100 fw-bold border

div.p: You do not have any leads matching this filter.

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-4 overflow-hidden h-100 shift-card bg-white

div.t-attf-class: p-2 #{'bg-success' if ld['lead'].stage_id.is_won else 'bg-primary' if ld['lead'].probability > 50 else 'bg-warning'}

span.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill px-2 py-1 small fw-bold #{'bg-success-subtle text-success' if ld['lead'].stage_id.is_won else 'bg-primary-subtle text-primary' if ld['lead'].probability > 50 else 'bg-warning-subtle text-warning'}

t.t-esc: ld['lead'].partner_name or ld['lead'].contact_name or 'No Contact Name'

div.class: mt-auto pt-3 border-top d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

a.class: btn btn-outline-dark rounded-pill w-100 py-2 mt-4 fw-bold shadow-xs

textarea.name: description
textarea.placeholder: Describe the customer's requirements, next actions or meeting notes...

button.class: btn btn-primary rounded-pill px-5 fw-bold shadow-sm

div.class: alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show shadow-sm rounded-4 border-0 mb-4 p-3
div.div: Success! Your update has been successfully logged to chatter history.

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-4 p-4 mb-4 bg-white
d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-between gap-2 border rounded-pill p-2

div.t-attf-class: flex-fill text-center rounded-pill px-3 py-2 fw-bold text-xs #{'bg-primary text-white shadow-sm' if is_active else 'text-muted'}

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-4 p-4 bg-white mb-4

a.class: btn btn-outline-primary rounded-pill w-50 py-2 fw-bold shadow-xs
btn btn-outline-dark rounded-pill w-50 py-2 fw-bold shadow-xs

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-4 p-4 bg-white
card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-4 p-4 bg-white mb-4

textarea.name: new_note
textarea.placeholder: Post a pipeline update, client meeting notes, or task progress here...

button.class: btn btn-dark rounded-pill px-4 fw-bold shadow-xs

div.class: d-flex flex-column flex-md-row justify-content-between align-items-md-center mb-4

div.p: Track and manage your assigned quotations and sales orders.

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm p-4 bg-white rounded-4 h-100
card border-0 shadow-sm p-4 bg-white rounded-4 h-100
card border-0 shadow-sm p-4 bg-white rounded-4 h-100
card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-4 p-3 mb-4 bg-white

a.t-attf-class: btn rounded-pill px-3 py-2 fw-bold text-sm text-center w-33 #{'btn-dark text-white' if filterby == 'all' or not filterby else 'btn-link text-muted text-decoration-none'}
btn rounded-pill px-3 py-2 fw-bold text-sm text-center w-33 #{'btn-dark text-white' if filterby == 'quotes' else 'btn-link text-muted text-decoration-none'}
btn rounded-pill px-3 py-2 fw-bold text-sm text-center w-33 #{'btn-dark text-white' if filterby == 'orders' else 'btn-link text-muted text-decoration-none'}

input.name: search
input.placeholder: Search by Order reference, Client or Email...

button.class: btn btn-outline-secondary rounded-end-pill border-start-0 px-4 bg-white text-muted

a.class: btn btn-light rounded-pill px-3 py-2 w-100 fw-bold border

div.p: You do not have any sales orders matching this filter.

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-4 overflow-hidden h-100 shift-card bg-white

div.t-attf-class: p-2 #{'bg-success' if od['order'].state in ('sale', 'done') else 'bg-warning' if od['order'].state in ('draft', 'sent') else 'bg-secondary'}

span.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill px-2 py-1 small fw-bold #{'bg-success-subtle text-success' if od['order'].state in ('sale', 'done') else 'bg-warning-subtle text-warning' if od['order'].state in ('draft', 'sent') else 'bg-secondary-subtle text-secondary'}

div.class: mt-auto pt-3 border-top d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

a.class: btn btn-outline-dark rounded-pill w-100 py-2 mt-4 fw-bold shadow-xs

div.class: alert alert-success alert-dismissible fade show rounded-4 border-0 shadow-sm p-4 mb-4 d-flex align-items-center
rounded-circle bg-success text-white p-2 me-3 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center

div.span: Your update has been successfully logged to chatter history.

ol.class: breadcrumb bg-white rounded-pill shadow-xs px-4 py-3

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-4 p-4 bg-white mb-4

span.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill px-3 py-2 small fw-bold #{'bg-success-subtle text-success' if order.state in ('sale', 'done') else 'bg-warning-subtle text-warning' if order.state in ('draft', 'sent') else 'bg-secondary-subtle text-secondary'}

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-4 p-4 mb-4 bg-white
d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-between gap-2 border rounded-pill p-2

div.t-attf-class: flex-fill text-center rounded-pill px-3 py-2 fw-bold text-xs #{'bg-primary text-white shadow-sm' if is_active else 'text-muted'}

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-4 p-4 bg-white
card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-4 p-4 bg-white mb-4
card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-4 p-4 bg-white mb-4
card border-0 shadow-sm rounded-4 p-4 bg-white

textarea.name: new_note
textarea.placeholder: Post a pipeline update, client meeting notes, or task progress here...

button.class: btn btn-dark rounded-pill px-4 fw-bold shadow-xs

div.p: Stay updated with the latest company news, notices, and events.

div.class: card h-100 shadow-sm border-0 overflow-hidden o_announcement_card
w-100 h-100 d-flex flex-column align-items-center justify-content-center bg-gradient text-white

span.class: position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-3 badge bg-white text-dark shadow-sm py-2 px-3 rounded-pill font-weight-bold text-xs

a.class: btn btn-outline-primary w-100 fw-bold py-2 mt-auto

div.class: card border-0 shadow-sm py-5 text-center bg-white

div.p: There are no notices posted on the board at this moment.

div.class: card shadow-sm border-0 overflow-hidden mb-4 bg-white

span.class: badge bg-primary py-2 px-3 rounded-pill me-3

xpath.attribute: o_portal_wrap#{' has-employee-sidebar' if (page_name and page_name not in ('home',) and employee and employee.grant_portal_access) else ''}

t.t-if: page_name and page_name not in ('home',) and employee and employee.grant_portal_access

a.class: sidebar-brand d-flex align-items-center px-4 py-3 text-decoration-none

a.t-attf-class: sidebar-item d-flex align-items-center px-4 py-2 text-decoration-none #{'active' if page_name == 'my_profile' else ''}
sidebar-item d-flex align-items-center px-4 py-2 text-decoration-none #{'active' if page_name == 'attendance' else ''}
sidebar-item d-flex align-items-center px-4 py-2 text-decoration-none #{'active' if page_name == 'leaves' else ''}
sidebar-item d-flex align-items-center px-4 py-2 text-decoration-none #{'active' if page_name == 'timesheets' else ''}
sidebar-item d-flex align-items-center px-4 py-2 text-decoration-none #{'active' if page_name == 'tasks' else ''}
sidebar-item d-flex align-items-center px-4 py-2 text-decoration-none #{'active' if page_name == 'expenses' else ''}
sidebar-item d-flex align-items-center px-4 py-2 text-decoration-none #{'active' if page_name == 'payroll' else ''}
sidebar-item d-flex align-items-center px-4 py-2 text-decoration-none #{'active' if page_name == 'schedule' else ''}
sidebar-item d-flex align-items-center px-4 py-2 text-decoration-none #{'active' if page_name == 'sale_orders' else ''}
sidebar-item d-flex align-items-center px-4 py-2 text-decoration-none #{'active' if page_name == 'crm_leads' else ''}
sidebar-item d-flex align-items-center px-4 py-2 text-decoration-none #{'active' if page_name == 'announcements' else ''}
